title: TAPPaaS Site
description: The Site is the top-level umbrella for a TAPPaaS installation (ADR-007d). It holds site-wide identity, location, hardware (Proxmox nodes + their storage pools), backup target, update schedule, module catalog repositories, and references to the organization config files. Environments are NOT listed here — they are simply whatever is present under config/environments/*.json (enumerated from the directory, not from site.json). Domain, DNS, and identity are per-environment (NOT site-wide) and live in config/environments/*.json. site.json replaces configuration.json at cutover; during the phased migration both files may coexist. See ADR-007 P2.

name.description: Slug identifier for the site (e.g. foobar-site).

email.description: Installer/admin contact email (Let's Encrypt ACME account, people bootstrap). Carried over from configuration.json .tappaas.email during the S3b reader cutover.

network.description: Site WAN configuration. No rootDomain — domains are per-environment.

isp.description: ISP name, for operator reference only.

publicIp.description: Public IP address, or "auto" to discover at runtime.

hardware.description: Physical hardware: the Proxmox nodes that make up the cluster.

nodes.description: List of Proxmox nodes. nodeCount is computed from this array (no separate field).

storagePools.description: Storage pools available on this node (e.g. ["tanka1", "tankb1"]).

backup.description: Site-wide backup target. null when no backup is configured yet.

defaultRetention.description: Site-wide default backup retention period (e.g. 7y, 5y, 1y). The base of the Site -> Environment -> Module retention cascade (ADR-007 P9): environments and modules may override it.

offsiteResidency.description: Data residency of the offsite backup buddy (ADR-007 P9). Used by validate-backup to reject backing an eu-only environment up to a non-EU offsite. eu-only by default; set global only when the offsite is outside the EU.

automaticReboot.description: Whether updates may reboot automatically. Site-wide until P3 (then moves to Environment).

snapshotRetention.description: Number of snapshots to retain. Site-wide until P3 (then moves to Environment).
